candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches total revenue figures and is the most standard top-line label.
Duplicate total of 'Revenue'; kept as secondary in case of label changes across years.
Finance income, not operating revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Represents bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to the owners of the Group
candidates.why: Owner-level comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Comprehensive income total, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income total, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not the revenue flow itself.

variables.notes: Standard top-line revenue is clearly labeled as 'Revenue', with 'Total Revenue' duplicating the same figures; both are provided as alternatives for robustness over time.

candidates.why: Direct operating costs of voyages; best representation of cost of sales for a shipping company.
Direct vessel operating costs closely tied to service delivery; also part of COGS-type expenses.
Overhead SG&A, not direct cost of sales, so excluded for COGS.
Non-operating by label; not COGS.
Too generic and appears outside core operating cost structure; not clearly COGS.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
candidates.why: Asset account, not an income statement cost line.

candidates.row_label: Accrued expenses and other current libilities
candidates.why: Liability aggregation, not COGS.
Liability detail, not COGS.

variables.notes: Voyage Expenses and Vessel operating expenses are the clearly identifiable direct operating costs associated with providing shipping services and together best represent COGS. G&A and non-operating expenses are excluded.

candidates.why: Direct operating cost of vessels; more akin to COGS than overhead SG&A, so excluded for SG&A purposes.
Explicit SG&A-type line item and clearly populated; best match for SG&A components.

variables.notes: An explicit and populated 'General and administrative expenses' line exists, so following the hierarchy we use it alone as SG&A. Vessel operating expenses are treated as direct operating costs, not SG&A.
No research and development-related line items are present in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet; XRD is treated as zero.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line combining interest and finance costs; best match for interest expense.
Balance sheet liability for accrued interest, not the period expense itself.
Represents interest income, not expense; excluded for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest and other finance costs - Balancing value
candidates.why: Adjusted/balancing version of the interest and finance costs line; used as secondary label if primary is missing in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest and other finance costs - Balancing value

variables.notes: The main expense line is 'Interest and other finance costs'; the corresponding balancing-value line is added as a secondary option to capture any re-labeled years. Interest income and balance sheet interest payable are not used for XINT.

candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to shareholders/owners and excludes any unspecified non-controlling interests; best match for book equity (BE).
Appears numerically identical to 'Total shareholders equity'; more generic and could conceptually include NCI, but owner-specific label is preferred.
Balance sheet balancing total, not pure equity; inappropriate for BE.

variables.notes: Owner/parent equity is clearly labeled as 'Total shareholders equity', which is preferred over the generic 'Total Equity'. No separate non-controlling interests line is present.
No line for non-controlling interests or minority interest appears in the Balance Sheet; MIB is therefore set to zero.
